chapter_title.en: Protocol of an agreement between the tribes of Rabeea and the people of Yemen

text: ومن حلف له (عليه السلام) كتبه بين ربيعة واليمن، نقل من خط هشام بن الكلبي

en.sayed-ali-raza: Written by Amīr al-mu’minīn as a protocol between the tribes of Rabī‘ah and the people of Yemen. Taken from the writing of Hishām ibn (Muḥammad) al-Kalbī.
